title: centaurea dealbescens
intro: Centaurea dealbescens, also known as the White Cockle or Snow Centaury, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and grayish-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its saponins and other compounds. Centaurea dealbescens is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
